question: [File: 'File Name: importer/src/main/java/org/hiero/mirror/importer/parser/StreamFileListener.java -> Scope: '] [Function: onEnd(T streamFile)] Can an unprivileged external user submit a crafted stream file whose parsed representation causes onEnd() to receive a StreamFile<?> object with a null or empty name field, bypassing downstream name-based deduplication checks and causing duplicate data to be persisted in the database?
